meta.name: Blog Minimal
meta.description: A clean, editorial blog template focused on readability

author_bio.label: Author Bio
author_bio.default: Writer, thinker, and curious human. Covering tech, culture, and ideas that matter.

featured_title.label: Featured Post Title
featured_title.default: The Quiet Revolution Happening in AI-Powered Design Tools

featured_excerpt.label: Featured Post Excerpt
featured_excerpt.default: Design tools are being reshaped by machine intelligence. Here's what it means for the craft, the profession, and the people who love both.

post1_title.label: Post 1 Title
post1_title.default: On Writing in the Age of LLMs

post1_excerpt.label: Post 1 Excerpt
post1_excerpt.default: What does authorship mean when machines can write? A meditation on craft, voice, and why it still matters.

post2_excerpt.label: Post 2 Excerpt
post2_excerpt.default: Reliability and simplicity beat novelty almost every time. The case for dull, dependable tools.

post3_excerpt.label: Post 3 Excerpt
post3_excerpt.default: Long-form newsletters, print magazines, and podcasts are thriving. Here's why depth is making a comeback.

about_text.label: About Text
about_text.default:
The Dispatch started as a personal notebook — a place to think out loud about technology, culture, and the ideas shaping our world. It grew into something bigger: a weekly newsletter read by thousands of people who care about depth over noise.

Every post is written with care, edited ruthlessly, and published only when it's ready. No filler. No hot takes for clicks. Just honest thinking, clearly expressed.

newsletter_desc.label: Newsletter Description
newsletter_desc.default: One email per week. Thoughtful essays on tech, culture, and ideas. No spam, ever.

contact_desc.label: Contact Description
contact_desc.default: Whether you want to pitch a collaboration, share feedback, or just say hi — I'd love to hear from you.
